sections.heading: Pathway
sections.content: [{"pathway_id": "localized_low_risk", "title": "Low-Risk Clinically Localized Prostate Cancer (PROS-3)", "branching_basis": ["Life expectancy", "Patient preference", "PSA density", "Number of positive cores", "Genomic risk", "BRCA2 germline mutation status"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "NCCN Low-risk: cT1-cT2a, Grade Group 1, PSA <10 ng/mL; life expectancy ≥10 years", "options": [{"type": "conservative", "label": "Active surveillance (preferred)", "preference": "preferred", "recommendation": "Active surveillance is preferred for most patients. Confirmatory testing within 6-12 months recommended. Monitor with PSA every 6 months, DRE every 12 months, repeat biopsy every 1-3 years, consider mpMRI every 12 months [PROS-F]", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "definitive_local", "label": "Radiation therapy (RT)", "preference": "other_recommended", "recommendation": "EBRT or brachytherapy as monotherapy without ENI, without ADT, without brachytherapy boost [PROS-J table 1]", "linked_regimen_ids": ["ebrt_moderate_hypofractionation", "sbrt", "brachytherapy_ldr_monotherapy"]}, {"type": "surgical", "label": "Radical prostatectomy (RP)", "preference": "other_recommended", "recommendation": "RP is appropriate for patients with life expectancy ≥10 years. Consider PLND if favorable intermediate-risk features [PROS-K]", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "No ADT recommended for low-risk disease with RT"}}, {"criteria": "Low-risk, life expectancy ≤5 years, asymptomatic", "options": [{"type": "observation", "label": "Observation", "preference": "preferred", "recommendation": "No imaging or treatment until symptomatic, then ADT should be given [PROS-2A footnote j]", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "ADT monotherapy only for symptomatic progression"}}]}, {"pathway_id": "localized_favorable_intermediate", "title": "Favorable Intermediate-Risk Prostate Cancer (PROS-4)", "branching_basis": ["Life expectancy", "Number of IRFs", "Grade Group", "Percentage of positive cores", "PSA density", "Cribriform histology", "Intraductal carcinoma"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Favorable intermediate-risk: 1 IRF, Grade Group 1-2, <50% positive cores; life expectancy >10 years", "options": [{"type": "conservative", "label": "Active surveillance", "preference": "preferred", "recommendation": "Consider active surveillance particularly for those with low percentage pattern 4, low tumor volume, low PSA density, and/or low genomic risk. Not recommended for patients with unfavorable histology (expansile/large cribriform, intraductal carcinoma) [PROS-F]. Patients should be counseled that unselected Grade Group 2 IR disease has unacceptably high risk of metastasis on active surveillance", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "definitive_local", "label": "Radiation therapy (RT) without ADT", "preference": "other_recommended", "recommendation": "EBRT or brachytherapy monotherapy without ENI, without brachytherapy boost. ADT is generally not recommended but can be considered if additional risk assessments suggest aggressive behavior [PROS-J]", "linked_regimen_ids": ["ebrt_moderate_hypofractionation", "sbrt", "brachytherapy_ldr_monotherapy"]}, {"type": "surgical", "label": "Radical prostatectomy (RP)", "preference": "other_recommended", "recommendation": "RP appropriate with life expectancy ≥10 years. Consider PLND [PROS-K]", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "ADT is not recommended with RT for most FIR patients; if given, short-term (4-6 months) only [PROS-G]"}}, {"criteria": "FIR, life expectancy ≤5 years, asymptomatic", "options": [{"type": "observation", "label": "Observation (preferred)", "preference": "preferred", "recommendation": "Observation is preferred for asymptomatic patients with life expectancy ≤5 years [PROS-F]", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "No adjuvant therapy in observation setting"}}]}, {"pathway_id": "localized_unfavorable_intermediate", "title": "Unfavorable Intermediate-Risk Prostate Cancer (PROS-5)", "branching_basis": ["Number of IRFs", "Grade Group", "Percentage of positive cores", "Life expectancy"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Unfavorable intermediate-risk: ≥2-3 IRFs, or Grade Group 3, or ≥50% positive cores; life expectancy >10 years", "options": [{"type": "definitive_local", "label": "RT + short-term ADT (4-6 months)", "preference": "preferred", "recommendation": "EBRT, brachytherapy monotherapy, or EBRT with brachytherapy boost. ST-ADT (4-6 months) recommended unless additional risk assessments suggest less aggressive tumor or if medically contraindicated. Concurrent/adjuvant ADT preferred over neoadjuvant ADT [PROS-J, PROS-G]. ENI should not be used routinely. Focal boosting with isotoxic delivery can be considered [PROS-J]", "linked_regimen_ids": ["ebrt_moderate_hypofractionation_adt4_6mo", "sbrt", "brachytherapy_ldr_monotherapy"]}, {"type": "surgical", "label": "R

nodes.label: NCCN Low-risk: cT1-cT2a, Grade Group 1, PSA <10 ng/mL; life expectancy ≥10 years
Favorable intermediate-risk: 1 IRF, Grade Group 1-2, <50% positive cores; life expectancy >10 years
Unfavorable intermediate-risk: ≥2-3 IRFs, or Grade Group 3, or ≥50% positive cores; life expectancy >10 years
